title: WEAVER, Better, Faster, Longer: An Effective World Model for Robotic Manipulation
summary: WEAVER is a world model architecture for robotic manipulation achieving strong performance across policy evaluation, policy improvement, and test-time planning. It targets three objectives — fidelity (physically accurate predictions), consistency (coherent long-horizon predictions), and efficiency (fast inference for planning) — using latent-space dynamics, sparse memory mechanisms, and efficient reward estimation. These choices enable downstream use without expensive image decoding.
